name: Seafresh Industry Public Company Limited
summary: Seafresh Industry Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes frozen raw shrimp, processed shrimp, and other seafood products in Thailand and internationally. It provides raw, cooked, sushi, and value added shrimp products, as well as shrimp powder and peeled head shrimp products. The company offers its products under the Seafresh, Sea Angel, GO-GO, Thai Chia, Phoenix, C Angel, and Ultra brands. It is also involved in the import and distribution of seafood; producing and selling animals feed and nutrition; consulting and installation of computer systems; and shrimp farm business. In addition, the company invests in seafood processing companies and other related business. Seafresh Industry Public Company Limited was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Mueang Chumphon, Thailand.
